text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: internalTargetPrice is an internal benchmark only and is NEVER sent to any supplier or shown on the RFQ form. It seeds the savings baseline alongside last-purchase price and informs the abnormal-price-spike flag.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Landed cost = quote + freight + insurance + duty

- exemption + local POD + local POL + customs clearance + demurrage/storage + misc + documentation. Damage is tracked separately, never folded into the comparison number. Missing charges fall back to the average of that charge from past orders so a comparison is never blocked.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Rank three-or-more quotes best to worst on normalized landed cost plus the scorecard-weighted composite (default 40 delivery / 30 quality / 20 cost / 10 service; compliance is a pass/fail gate, not weighted). Colour-code green/amber/red. Flag any quote price more than 5% above last purchase
price. Savings are reported, not gated. The buyer must justify any non-top pick.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Payment terms dropdown (exact set): 100% advance | part-advance + against documents | part-advance + against shipment | 30/70 | net 30 | net 60 | net 90. Incoterm dropdown (exact set): EXW | FOB | CIF | CFR | FCA | CPT | CIP | DAP. FOB/CIF/CFR are sea-only; air/road/courier/multimodal
